channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KRISHIVAL] Krishival Foods Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Designated Employees
item.description:
Krishival Foods Ltd has announced the closure of the Trading Window for dealing in the Company's Equity Shares. The closure is in connection with the declaration of audited financial results of the Company for the quarter and year ended on March 31, 2026. The Trading Window will open 48 hours after the said financial results are declared to the Stock Exchanges.

  • Krishival Foods Ltd has announced the closure of the Trading Window for dealing in the Company's Equity Shares.
  • The closure is in connection with the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and year ended on March 31, 2026.
  • The Trading Window will open 48 hours after the financial results are declared to the Stock Exchanges.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Krishival Foods Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [COFORGE] Coforge modernizes global employee experience with ServiceNow AI-powered HR Service Delivery platform
item.description:
Coforge Limited, a global digital services and solutions provider, has successfully rolled out ServiceNow's AI-powered HR Service Delivery platform. This transformation marks a significant milestone in Coforge's enterprise-wide AI and digital transformation journey, modernizing the employee experience for its 35,000+ global workforce. The GenAI-enabled HRSD platform redefines HR service delivery, improves employee satisfaction, and enables a consistent experience across geographies. The implementation has unified critical HR processes, extended the platform with AI agents, and provided a scalable, AI-first foundation for the organization's growth.

  • Coforge modernizes employee experience with ServiceNow AI-powered HRSD platform
  • Unified critical HR processes and deep integrations with learning platforms, verification systems, and core HR tools
  • Built AI agents for predictive onboarding, personalized learning journeys, automated goal-setting workflows, and real-time performance analytics
  • Scalable, AI-first foundation for global enterprises to navigate rapid growth and geographic complexity
  • ServiceNow HRSD platform as the clear and strategic choice for building Coforge's new global HR system

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Coforge Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [KIDUJA] Kiduja India Ltd Closes Trading Window Until After Q4 FY26 Financial Results
item.description:
Kiduja India Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with the company's Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report trading by insiders. The closure will be effective from 1st April 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending 31st March 2026. This is a routine measure taken to ensure compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations 2015.

  • Kiduja India Ltd closes trading window in line with its Code of Conduct.
  • The closure will be effective from 1st April 2026.
  • The window will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for Q4 FY26.
  • This move is in compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations 2015.
  • The trading window closure is a routine measure taken by the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KIDUJA INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SEPC] SEPC Limited Announces Strategic Acquisition of 90% Stake in Avenir International Engineers and Consultants LLC
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SEPC Limited, a leading EPC solutions provider, has announced the acquisition of a 90% equity stake in Avenir International Engineers and Consultants LLC, Abu Dhabi. This strategic move aims to expand SEPC’s global footprint and strengthen its presence in the high-growth Oil & Gas engineering sector, particularly across the Middle East and North Africa (MENA) region. The acquisition is expected to enable SEPC’s entry into the global Oil & Gas EPC and consulting ecosystem, strengthen its international execution capabilities and geographic diversification, provide access to high-margin, technology-driven engineering services, and create a scalable platform for growth in the MENA region.

  • SEPC Limited acquires 90% stake in Avenir International Engineers and Consultants LLC
  • Acquisition aims to expand SEPC’s global footprint and strengthen its presence in the Oil & Gas engineering sector
  • Avenir International specializes in Oil & Gas Engineering, Front-End Engineering Design (FEED), and Project Management Consultancy (PMC)
  • Avenir brings deep domain expertise and established client relationships with leading entities such as ADNOC and DEWA
  • Transaction details: 90% stake acquired, share swap arrangement, valuation at ~INR 1,530 crore

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SEPC Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [MLKFOOD] Milkfood Ltd Closes Trading Window for Insider Trading until 48 hours after Q4 and FY26 Results
item.description:
Milkfood Ltd, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, has announced the closure of the Trading Window for dealing in shares of the Company by persons specified under the Code. The closure will begin on April 1, 2026 (Wednesday) and will remain in effect until 48 hours after the announcement/declaration of the Financial Results of the Company for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026.

  • Milkfood Ltd closes Trading Window for Insider Trading from April 1, 2026
  • Trading Window to remain closed until 48 hours after Q4 and FY26 Results announcement
  • Announcement made in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Persons specified under the Code are subject to the Trading Window closure
  • Trading Window to reopen 48 hours after the Financial Results announcement

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MILKFOOD LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [KPIGREEN] KPI Green Energy Successfully Energises 965 MWp Capacity out of its 2.17 GWp Independent Power Producer Portfolio
item.description:
🔥 Trending

KPI Green Energy Limited has successfully energised 965 MWp capacity out of its 2.17 GWp Independent Power Producer (IPP) Portfolio. This includes 376 MWp capacity from GUVNL 250/350 MWp and GUVNL 370 MW/677 MWp projects. The company has a total IPP portfolio of 2.17 GWp, with the balance capacity under execution and expected to be commissioned in a phased manner. This milestone strengthens KPI's position as a leading IPP, reflecting its strong project development and delivery capabilities and enhancing long-term revenue visibility.

  • KPI Green Energy has energised 965 MWp capacity out of its 2.17 GWp IPP Portfolio.
  • This includes 376 MWp capacity from GUVNL 250/350 MWp and GUVNL 370 MW/677 MWp projects.
  • The company has a total IPP portfolio of 2.17 GWp, with the balance capacity under execution.
  • This milestone strengthens KPI's position as a leading IPP.
  • KPI's strong project development and delivery capabilities are reflected in this achievement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KPI Green Energy Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [DHARFIN] Dharani Finance Ltd Closes Trading Window for FY 2025-2026 Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Dharani Finance Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for the purpose of considering the audited financial results for the fiscal year ending 31st March 2026. This closure is in accordance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and the Company’s Code of Conduct for prohibition of Insider Trading. The trading window will be closed from Wednesday, April 01, 2026 till 48 hours after the conclusion of the Board Meeting to approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended 31st March 2026. Designated persons and their immediate relatives have been informed not to trade in equity shares of the Company during this period.

  • Dharani Finance Ltd closes trading window for FY 2025-2026 audited financial results
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI regulations and Company’s Code of Conduct
  • Trading window to remain closed from April 01, 2026 till 48 hours post Board Meeting
  • Designated persons and their immediate relatives advised not to trade during this period
  • Board Meeting date to approve audited financial results for quarter and year ended 31st March 2026 will be informed in due course

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DHARANI FINANCE LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [KLBRENG-B] Kilburn Engineering Ltd Secures Rs. 5458 Lakhs Worth of New Orders
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kilburn Engineering Ltd has announced the receipt of orders amounting to Rs. 5458 lakhs since the previous announcement dated 28th January 2026. The orders are in the ordinary course of business and include Rotary Dryers for Limestone, Paddle Dryer & Cooler for Palm Oil, VFBDs & Band Dryer, Tea Dryers, and Service/Spares/Others. The total value of these orders is Rs. 5458 lakhs.

  • Kilburn Engineering Ltd has secured orders worth Rs. 5458 lakhs since the last announcement.
  • The orders are in the ordinary course of business and include various types of dryers and coolers.
  • The total value of these orders is Rs. 5458 lakhs.
  • The company has received LOIs and orders for Rotary Dryers for Limestone, Paddle Dryer & Cooler for Palm Oil, VFBDs & Band Dryer, Tea Dryers, and Service/Spares/Others.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KILBURN ENGINEERING LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SUZLON] Suzlon Wins Sixth Repeat Order of 100 MW from GAIL
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Suzlon Energy Ltd has won its sixth repeat order of 100 MW from GAIL. The project will be executed in Nandurbar district of Maharashtra, supplying 47 S120 WTGs with a rated capacity of 2.1 MW. This is Suzlon's fourth PSU order of the current fiscal, reflecting its growing strength in the PSU segment. The power generated from this project will support the decarbonization of GAIL’s upcoming petrochemical plant in Nandurbar, Maharashtra. Suzlon has a ~38% market share in Maharashtra and has played a key role in the state’s growth as one of India’s leading renewable energy hubs.

  • Suzlon wins its sixth repeat order of 100 MW from GAIL
  • Fourth PSU order of current fiscal after NTPC, BPCL and AMC ecosystem
  • To install 47 state-of-the-art S120 wind turbine generators (WTGs)
  • Power generated from this project will support the decarbonization of GAIL’s upcoming petrochemical plant in Nandurbar, Maharashtra
  • Suzlon has a ~38% market share in Maharashtra and has played a key role in the state’s growth as one of India’s leading renewable energy hubs

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUZLON ENERGY LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [PANAMAPET] Panama Petrochem Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window Until After Q4 Results in 2026
item.description:
Panama Petrochem Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for persons specified under the Company's Code of Conduct. The closure will be in effect from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of Financial Results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026. The exact date of the announcement will be informed in due course. This action is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • Panama Petrochem Ltd announces closure of trading window from April 01, 2026
  • Closure is in effect until 48 hours after Q4 and year-end results declaration on March 31, 2026
  • The announcement date will be informed in due course
  • Action is in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Trading window closure for persons specified under the Company's Code of Conduct

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PANAMA PETROCHEM LTD. | Category: Business Update
